name: Is FAQ schema enough to get my content into AI answers?
description: No. FAQ schema helps, but it is not enough by itself. Your page still needs clear, visible, trustworthy answers and supporting context.

mainEntity.name: Is FAQ schema enough to get my content into AI answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but only if the content is genuinely visible and useful to users. Answer engines tend to favor pages where the question and answer are easy to read on-page, the markup is accurate, and the page adds real value instead of repeating generic marketing copy.
acceptedAnswer.description: No. FAQ schema helps, but it is not enough by itself. Your page still needs clear, visible, trustworthy answers and supporting context.
